user.title: Snohomish County PUD account
user.description: Enter your MySnoPUD login. The integration will download your Green Button usage on a schedule and feed hourly readings into the Home Assistant Energy Dashboard. This is an unofficial community integration — it is not built or supported by Snohomish County PUD.

pick_meters.title: Select meters
pick_meters.description: Found {count} meter(s) on this account. Choose which ones to track. Retired / non-smart meters usually only report billing-interval totals; if you want that older history, enable 'Back-fill billing-interval history' in the integration's options after setup completes.

error.no_meters_selected: Please select at least one meter
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check Home Assistant logs

init.title: SnoPUD options
init.description: MySnoPUD data typically lags the wall clock by 5–8 hours, so polling more often than hourly gains nothing. The hourly backfill window only takes effect on first setup of each meter — raising it later won't retroactively fetch older hourly history. The billing-interval backfill toggle, by contrast, can be switched on at any time: enabling it kicks off a one-shot retroactive billing import on the next refresh for any selected meter that hasn't already had one.

data.enable_billing_backfill: Back-fill billing-interval history (for retired / non-smart meters)
